description: Product Description Baby Bucket Sun Hat - Main Features Adjustable Toggle Chin Strap with Safety Release Peace of mind as standard with our adjustable safety chin strap that quickly releases to guard against strangulation and then can be easily re-attached. The strap ensures that the summer baby hat will stay put even on a windy beach Wide Brim 4cm wide brim providing excellent head, face and neck shade for baby 100% Cotton Lined Keeping baby cool : this cotton twill baby bucket hat has a light cotton lining to keep baby comfortable 6 Colours and 4 Sizes The choice is yours : From 0-18 months in unisex, baby girl, baby boy and gender neutral colours to match your baby clothes and accessories Measure Your Baby's Head to Get The Best Fit Baby Bucket Hat Age/Size Centimetre Sizes 0-3 months = 42cm 3-6 months = 44cm 6-12 months = 46cm 12-18 months = 48cm Fit Type True fit to centimetre size Size Guide Measure Baby's Head For the Best Fit Baby hat sizes are not an exact science so it's always best to check your little one's head size to make sure that the baby sun hat will fit well How To Measure Around Your Baby's Head It's easy to measure - just measure right around your baby's head just above the ears and then compare the centimetre reading with the hat sizes All About Faith & Sarah Kids Baby Sun Hat with Chin Strap Baby bucket sun hat with chin strap for baby boy or baby girl from 0-18 months. This baby summer bucket beach cap has a quick release safety toggle chin strap, is 100% cotton twill with light cotton lining and offers very good sun protection with a wider than average 4cm wide brim. This is a good quality classic bucket sun hat for a baby boy or baby girl with a wider than average brim and an adjustable strap that ensures the baby bucket hat will stay on even in windy conditions. The baby sun hat comes with additional peace of mind due to the safety clasp chin strap that will quickly release in the event of an emergency and then can be easily re-attached. The baby sun hat comes in six colours: white, pink, light blue, navy blue, denim and royal blue and in four sizes: 0-3 months 42cm, 3-6 months 44cm, 6-12 months 46cm and 12-18 months 48cm. Ideal for the beach, holidays, sunny days or everyday wear, the hat is packable and a timeless style that suits both baby boys and baby girls, unisex and gender neutral. The hat is made from a medium weight 100% cotton twill with a lighter weight cool cotton lining The chin strap can be adjusted to fit your baby perfectly using the toggle. 100% cotton and machine washable, the hat will not lose its shape when packed and is an essential and practical baby sun hat. Ideal for holidays, the beach, sunny days, everyday wear.
